why_live_phase6_adjudication_is_not_enab: All currently documented unresolved surfaces are either still too risky for live second-pass adjudication or have not accumulated enough replay evidence.
Generic specialist process wording remains the cleanest candidate, but even there the final referral-needed-only gating pass ended in a no-go decision.
No other unresolved surface has a lower-risk live path than the already-rejected generic-specialist pilot.

properties: Only one configured surface may be considered at a time
Control plane is disabled by default
Kill switch remains active by default
No answer-generation changes are permitted through the control plane
Only allowlisted families ranked per unresolved surface

why: The control plane is now present, but no unresolved surface has yet met the replay and neighbor-theft bar required for a live override.
Referral-needed-only live pilot is still too brittle at the wording boundary.
Routing/arrangement and free-care/coverage buckets must remain excluded.
This surface still sits on the protected payment-dispute edge.
Any live move would reopen frozen complaint-family boundaries.
This strand remains explicitly deferred and must stay symbolic/bounded.

too_risky_for_live_adjudication_right_no.risk: The only remaining disagreement strong enough to consider is too close to stable routing behavior and not broad enough for safe override.
A mistaken override would weaken complaint_unexpected_payment_dispute_v2.
A live adjudicator here would risk reopening frozen complaint-routing boundaries.
Eligibility and legal-basis policy must not be handed to live semantic arbitration yet.

evidence_required_before_revisiting_any_: A larger and more diverse replay set on the exact candidate surface
Bucket-level proof that protected neighboring owners remain untouched
A threshold rule that keeps the runtime winner on mixed or weak evidence
No answer-generation changes and no widening beyond the allowlisted family set
Regression-green and validation-baseline-unchanged proof for any future pilot

recommended_future_path.next_step: Run an internal staff pilot with shadow telemetry on, keep live adjudication disabled, and only revisit one documented unresolved surface if reviewed replay plus the disabled control-plane gate show a safe bounded override path.
do_not_do_yet: No reopening of frozen Phase 5 families
